resposta:
solution: 
```
class Solution:
    def minOperations(self, n: int) -> int:
        res = 0
        while n:
            n -= n & -n
            res += 1
        return res
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses a bitwise trick to subtract the least significant 1-bit from n in each iteration, effectively reducing the number of operations needed to make n equal to 0.
